default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 53 published, 7 in CMS, 8 ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Significant growth in clicks (551 total, 170 for new articles) and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy being implemented to boost SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [New leads generated from Google search, highlighting content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [53 articles published](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [7 articles currently in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [8 articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [No refreshes this week due to workflow issue; 3 new articles added instead](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Next week will compensate for missed refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Total clicks increased from 373 to 551 (including new and refreshed content)](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New articles: 170 clicks (up from 109 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Impressions jumped by \~8,400](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Reporting now split between new and refreshed content for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [Interlinking batch of 10 articles with best-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Aim: Boost SEO juice and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Implementation timeline: Andrej to finish current batch tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### Lead Generation

  - [New leads generated early this week (Monday/Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Source: Google search (specific articles unknown)](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Upcoming Tasks

  - [Discuss in-content CTA implementation with Jessica (async on Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Address 404 internal link issues in new content](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Team to implement triple-check process before content reaches review stage](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Jessica returning full-time tomorrow or Friday](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Andrej was out for a few days but is back on track](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sadira to review new batch of articles tonight](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Sadira to send article links to Andrej for additional review](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Team to maintain regular cadence of article uploads and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Investigate reason for impression spike in late January/early February](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Implement in-content CTAs (pending discussion with Jessica)](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance metrics, especially new vs. refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/-QxcqTLbWHgWJGKkXawvJqX189K7y1SQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

action_items.description: Review new batch of articles tonight
Send Andrej links to docs for this week's batch of articles
Review new batch of articles ASAP after receiving links from Sadira
